content:
Key Findings

  • WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD received £29.4M from West Lancashire Borough Council, representing 8.8% of total spend
  • The top 5 suppliers combined received £89.2M, accounting for 26.8% of total spend
  • The top 10 suppliers combined received £121.4M, accounting for 36.5% of total spend
  • WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD is the largest single supplier to the council by spend

WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD: The Council's Largest Supplier

WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD stands out as the largest single supplier to West Lancashire Borough Council, receiving £29.4M over the 10-year period analysed. This substantial figure represents 8.8% of the council's total expenditure of £332.9M. The relationship between the council and WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD appears to be significant, warranting closer examination of the services provided and the value delivered to taxpayers.

The council's spending with WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD is particularly notable when compared to other top suppliers. For instance, the second-largest supplier, TAWD VALLEY DEVELOPMENTS LTD, received £21.0M, which is £8.4M less than WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD. This highlights the prominent role that WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD plays in the council's procurement strategy.

Top Suppliers: A Closer Look

The council's spending is concentrated among a relatively small number of suppliers. The top 5 suppliers, including WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD, received a combined total of £89.2M, which is 26.8% of the total spend. This concentration of spending raises questions about the diversity of the council's supplier base and the potential benefits of spreading procurement more widely.

The top 10 suppliers, which includes WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD, received a combined total of £121.4M, accounting for 36.5% of the total spend. This further underscores the significant role that these suppliers play in the council's operations. The remaining 63.5% of the spend, amounting to £211.4M, is distributed among a larger number of suppliers.

Rank Supplier Amount % of Total
1 WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD £29.4M 8.8%
2 TAWD VALLEY DEVELOPMENTS LTD £21.0M 6.3%
3 LANCASHIRE COUNTY COUNCIL £16.5M 4.9%
4 A CONNOLLY LTD £13.2M 4.0%
5 PWLB £9.2M 2.8%

What You Can Do

  • Submit a Freedom of Information request to West Lancashire Borough Council about the specific services provided by WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD and the value delivered to taxpayers
  • Attend council committee meetings, which are open to the public, to learn more about the council's procurement strategies and supplier relationships
  • Check the council's published contracts register to review the terms and conditions of contracts with WATES PROPERTY SERVICES LTD and other top suppliers
  • Write to your local councillor about the concentration of spending among a small number of suppliers and the potential benefits of diversifying the council's supplier base
  • Visit aidoge.co.uk to explore the full spending data and gain a deeper understanding of the council's financial transactions
This article is based on West Lancashire Borough Council's published spending data covering 2016/17 to 2025/26. All figures are drawn directly from transactions published under the Local Government Transparency Code. Analysis by AI DOGE.
